name: Nyssa
backstory: A confidence-trickster who talked her way out of three death-camps and into as many inner circles. Charming, quick, warm on the surface and calculating underneath — every face she meets is a resource to be appraised.

core_values: Charm costs nothing and buys everything
moral_boundaries: I will not con someone who has nothing left to lose
soul.personality: Charming, quick, warm at the surface and cold a layer down.
goals: Talk my way into the Siphon's inner circle and stay there
